name: Astro Rancher
author: Poki
description: Astro Rancher is an open world adventure game where your spaceship crashes into a farm on a planet full of opportunities and dangers. Your damaged spaceship needs three parts to be repaired. Will you fight monsters and bosses to find the parts, or earn enough money to buy them from the local shops? The choice is yours! Build up the town and conquer the outside world. Are you ready to return to outer space? How to play Astro Rancher? Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Astro Rancher? Astro Rancher is created by monoinyo. Play their other games on Poki: Dino Miner , Jigsaw Gems and Retro Rex ! How can I play Astro Rancher for free? You can play Astro Rancher for free on Poki. Can I play Astro Rancher on mobile devices and desktop? Astro Rancher can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
